ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (stage 2/3, cap $12). Cross-ref stage-1 log ea48de9c.

INPUT: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/out/decisions.jsonl (2018 clean AskUserQuestion decisions, all root=mirror). Fields: session_id, tool_use_id, question_index, header, question, options[], option_count, multi_select, picks[{text,option_index,is_custom}], context_digest.

TASK FRAMING: predict which option the user picked given (header, question, options, context). Single-select label class in {0,1,2,3,custom} where custom = is_custom or option_index is None. Multi-select scored separately.

SPLIT: repo export convention split_of(session_id) = test iff int(sha256(session_id),16)%10==0 (group split by session, inherited from cc_steer.rendering.split_of). Deterministic. Computed sizes: train 1803, eval 215 (202 single-select + 13 multi-select). 48 eval sessions vs 416 train, verified zero session overlap.

BASELINES:
B1 majority-class: (1a) per-header train-empirical class dist, backoff to global for unseen headers; (1b) per option-position = global position marginal renormalized over each row's valid class set. Both emit a per-class distribution (argmax=pred, max=confidence).
B2 evidence-retrieval + opus zero-shot: TF-IDF retrieval over train (header+question+context_digest), top-5 neighbors as few-shot exemplars showing their user pick; opus (via cc_steer.claude.run_claude, model=opus, repo judge convention = claude CLI headless, no explicit temperature -> model default) returns JSON {pick, probs[] over options+custom}. Run on all 215 eval rows (>=150 spec floor). Async parallel, concurrency<=8.
B3 calibrated logistic regression: pointwise per-(row,option) binary "will this option be picked" framing + synthetic custom candidate. Features: header one-hot, option_count, position one-hot, option-text TF-IDF, context_digest TF-IDF keywords. sklearn LogisticRegression(class_weight=balanced) fit on train-minus-calibration; calibrate via repo fit_temperature/probs_from_logits (cc_steer.retrain.lexical) on a held-out group-split calibration slice. Single-select: row-normalize calibrated candidate probs to a class dist. Multi-select: independent per-option calibrated prob.

METRICS (per baseline, on eval): accuracy (top-1), ECE (REUSE cc_steer.retrain.lexical.ece:217 as confidence-calibration: labels=correct?, probs=max-class-conf, 15 bins), Brier (multiclass = mean sum_k (p_k - onehot_k)^2). Single-select metrics on the 202 single-select eval rows; all 3 baselines on identical eval set for head-to-head. MULTI-SELECT (13 eval rows): subset-match accuracy (exact set) + per-option ROC-AUC and PR-AUC (repo pr_auc) separately. Bootstrap 95% CI on accuracy (1000 resamples, seed 24), reported as instrument context — NO promote/kill verdict (baselines only).

SUCCESS CRITERION: three baselines each produce accuracy/ECE/Brier on the shared eval split + multi-select subset-match/per-option-AUC; predictions + metrics persisted to out/; opus spend under $12. Deliverable = comparative metrics table establishing the difficulty floor for the AskUserQuestion pick-prediction task.

ARTIFACTS (out/): preds_b1_header.jsonl, preds_b1_position.jsonl, preds_b2_opus.jsonl, preds_b3_logreg.jsonl, metrics.json, metrics_table.md. Raw opus responses kept for verify lane.
